Chagos Islands deal bill paused for talks with USA minister says the UK is discussing "concerns" with the US, after President Trump criticised the deal. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr5lqd4g338o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cr5lqd4g338o#0 Wed, 25 Feb 2026 14:23:04 GMT

UK records warmest day of the year as temperatures climb above 17CAfter a relentlessly wet start to the year the UK has recorded its warmest day of the year as many places bask in the late winter sunshine. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cedzvwe1nn5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cedzvwe1nn5o#0 Wed, 25 Feb 2026 14:09:20 GMT
